title: clinopodium sphenophyllum
intro: Clinopodium sphenophyllum, also known as mountain basil or bearded Clinopodium, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Clinopodium sphenophyllum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
